title: RandyBits
description: An electric robot appeared out of nowhere. Will you be able to defeat him? He might have more than one secret inside his circuits...
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/973f1886ca9ce3ed82c0560f0053f1c28caa34b0.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QmEAc8uU514" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c43c5fe02482f02b53c8a426ddbfa3c021ad7f3.png)

RandyBits! Welcome to one of the most unique mods out there. RandyBits is a pseudo-bossrush mod for Minecraft, which revolves around Randy. Your goal as a player is to fight and defeat Randy in each of his 3 phases separately. He will change his behaviour, abilities, and call his bots friends for help, so you better be ready to fail multiples times!

For more information go to the curseforge page: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/randybits-forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/randybits-forge)
